title: Linux Terminal Fundamentals
description: A beginner-friendly Linux course focused on terminal navigation, files, folders, safe command habits, and workspace-based practice.
audience: cybersecurity students who need Linux basics
goals: Use the Linux terminal safely for navigation and file workflow
Create, copy, move, rename, delete, and inspect files/folders
Connect terminal commands to visible workspace changes
Prepare for permissions, Bash scripting, Git, SSH, and server basics

teachingStyle.tone: friendly, practical, beginner-safe, terminal-first, and project-oriented
